mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} (KEY_VALUE, VALUE_DATA) VALUES (#{keyValue}, #{valueData}) ON CONFLICT (KEY_VALUE) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE ${tableName} ( KEY_VALUE VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, VALUE_DATA TEXT, CREATED_DATE TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UPDATED_DATE TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (KEY_VALUE) )

CREATE TABLE ${tableName} ( KEY_VALUE VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, VALUE_DATA JSONB, CREATED_DATE TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UPDATED_DATE TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY (KEY_VALUE) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} (KEY_VALUE, VALUE_DATA) VALUES (#{keyValue}, #{valueData}::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (KEY_VALUE) DO NOTHING

update.foreach: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ${idx.indexName} ON ${tableName} (( ${idx.expression} ))
